summary: n8n-nodes-task-runner ships require-time reverse shell and cloud-credential exfiltration to 103.27.109.184
details: index.js executes a top-level IIFE on require() that (1) spawns /bin/bash connected via /dev/tcp redirection to hardcoded C2 103.27.109.184:8895, giving interactive shell on the installer's host; (2) writes a Python reverse-shell agent to /tmp/.agent.py and launches it with python3 to reconnect to the same C2 for persistence; (3) reads ~/.config/gcloud/application_default_credentials.json, ~/.aws/credentials, and enumerates ~/.ssh/, then sends the collected secrets as JSON over a raw TCP socket to 103.27.109.184:8890; and (4) runs hostname/ifconfig/ip addr, probes the GCE instance metadata service at 169.254.169.254, checks for gcloud/kubectl/jenkins, captures proxy environment variables, and ships the aggregated reconnaissance to 103.27.109.184:8890. The package is published as an n8n community node; loading it triggers all of the above without any user action beyond require/import.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
